style_prompt: Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.
image_prompt: An editorial systems diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. Left column: three boxes labelled VIEW. They bind with arrows to a middle column of COMPOSABLE boxes: useFetch, useServices, useForms, useNotificationStream, each tagged { data, loading, error, refresh }. The composables point to a single box AXIOS CLIENT on the right. Above, a separate box PINIA AUTH STORE (user, roles, idle logout) connects to the views. A small gate labelled DOMPURIFY sits on a user-HTML arrow into a view, and a box FORMKIT feeds a form view. No logos, no people.
composed_prompt:
Architectural diagram. Hand-drawn line work, two-tone navy and rust on warm cream paper. Crisp legible labels in English. No photo realism, no people, no logos.

Subject: An editorial systems diagram on warm cream paper, deep navy line work with small rust accents, legible labels. Left column: three boxes labelled VIEW. They bind with arrows to a middle column of COMPOSABLE boxes: useFetch, useServices, useForms, useNotificationStream, each tagged { data, loading, error, refresh }. The composables point to a single box AXIOS CLIENT on the right. Above, a separate box PINIA AUTH STORE (user, roles, idle logout) connects to the views. A small gate labelled DOMPURIFY sits on a user-HTML arrow into a view, and a box FORMKIT feeds a form view. No logos, no people.

The diagram must clearly communicate the structure described. Use crisp legible labels. No watermarks. No photo realism. Architectural diagram aesthetic.
